return(function(U,G,X,b,B,Z,I,e,p,F,T,D,i,k,P,z,a,R,x,H,m,q,s,C,K)m,F,T,q,e,s,D,R,a,x,C,i,k,z,p,P,H,K=function(U,c)local G=a(c)local X=function(X,b,B)return i(U,{X,b;B},c,G)end return X end,function(U)local c,i=-99869+99870,U[947242-947241]while i do H[i],c=H[i]-(52559+-52558),c+(352894-352893)if 997856-997856==H[i]then H[i],C[i]=nil,nil end i=U[c]end end,function(U,c)local end,{},function(i,X,b,B)local XK,j,DK,RK,kK,qK,cK,t,g,FK,iK,zK,CK,h,GK,d,sK,Q,pK,KK,eK,y,O,OK,K,bK,TK,HK,M,Y,BK,PK,ZK,J,w,F,IK,o,xK,mK,aK,H,S,A,n,a,v,UK,L,W,E,V,u,f,N,I,r,l while i do if end,function(U,c)local G=a(c)local X=function(...)return i(U,{...},c,G)end return X end,function(U,c)local G=a(c)local X=function(X,b,B,Z,I,C,H)return i(U,{X,b,B;Z,I,C;H},c,G)end return X
